series_metadata.series_description: Record of customer service requests for software creation, changes, modifications and enhancements used in the delivery of public assistance program services and operational support. Files include service requests, checklists, testing documentation, justification and related correspondence. Requests are made as a result of changes in the law, operational need, and software improvements.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office and 4 years in records center are completed, reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: in office 5 years completed, reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved
